Privacy
Home/Services

Services

Installation and support for building systems

Opticable offers two complementary sides: system installation and ongoing support after commissioning. We do not just deliver equipment; we also help manage, maintain, and expand it.

Request a quoteAbout

Commercial technology and building systems

Opticable designs, installs, and manages building technology for commercial properties, with long-term support after commissioning.

Security camerasAccess controlCommercial WiFiIntercomNetwork infrastructureIT services

Services

Core services

The systems people rely on every day: security, entry, front-door communication, WiFi, and network IT support.

Security

Security cameras

CCTV

IP cameras, PoE, NVRs, remote viewing, and ongoing support to protect sensitive areas, common spaces, perimeters, and entries.

View service

Access

Access control

ACCESS

Readers, locks, panels, door cabling, and ongoing access administration for lobbies, entries, and restricted areas.

View service

Wireless

Commercial WiFi

WIFI

WiFi quality, access points, coverage planning, cabling, and network foundations for commercial buildings.

View service

Entry

Intercom

INTERCOM

Audio or video intercom systems for lobbies, gates, and visitor entries, integrated with access control and the network.

View service

Network support

Network infrastructure

IT

Main network rooms, racks, patch panels, handoffs, and clean distribution for building systems that are easier to operate.

View service

Ongoing support

IT services

IT

Device management, network support, maintenance, and technical support for your environment after installation.

View service

Services

Supporting infrastructure

Cabling, fiber, racks, technical rooms, and VoIP provide the foundation that keeps the other systems reliable.

Cabling

Structured cabling

CAB

Cat 5e, Cat 6, Cat 6A, coaxial, patch panels, testing, and documentation for a clean building network base.

View service

Backbone

Fiber optic

FIBER

Backbone links between floors, network rooms, and distant zones when capacity or distance outgrows copper.

View service

Voice

IP telephony

VOIP

Business telephony, SIP lines, handsets, VoIP cabling, and network support for commercial offices.

View service

Our installation method

A well-delivered project starts with proper preparation.

01

Site evaluation

We review your needs, entries, sensitive areas, and the infrastructure already in place.

02

Clear recommendation

You receive a proposal suited to your building, budget, and timeline, without surprises.

03

Clean installation

Our teams install, test, and identify the components carefully. The site is left clean.

04

Commissioning and support

We validate the full system, hand over a documented setup, and stay available for ongoing management and support.

Services

Why a single partner helps

What changes when installation, support, and infrastructure coordination stay with the same team.

Unified ecosystem

Cameras, intercom, and access control can share one management platform to monitor, unlock, and communicate.

Support after installation

We stay available for maintenance, adjustments, system administration, and technical support.

Useful documentation

Labeling, rack organization, and handover information are prepared for the teams that will operate the site.

Site coordination

We work with property managers, developers, general contractors, and other trades without complicating the schedule.

Let’s discuss your project

Need a technology partner for your building?

Tell us about your building, the systems you need, and your timeline. We will come back with a clear proposal suited to your reality. Opticable serves commercial buildings in Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, and across Quebec.

Request a quoteView all services

Opticable installs and supports cameras, access, WiFi, intercom, cabling, and network infrastructure for commercial buildings in Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, and across Quebec.
